name: LogicGate Risk Cloud API
what_it_does: LogicGate Risk Cloud REST API for enterprise risk and compliance management platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve risk register data, track compliance program status, manage workflow records and tasks, access third-party risk assessments, and integrate LogicGate GRC data into enterprise reporting and risk operations workflows. LogicGate uses a configurable no-code workflow approach to GRC.
use_cases: Retrieving enterprise risk register and risk ratings from risk monitoring agents
Tracking third-party vendor risk assessments from procurement compliance agents
Managing GRC workflow records and task assignments from operations agents
Integrating LogicGate risk data into board-level reporting workflow agents
not_for: Startup compliance without enterprise risk management needs
Automated risk decision-making without human oversight
best_when: A large enterprise using LogicGate Risk Cloud wants AI agents to monitor risk register changes, track remediation workflows, and integrate risk intelligence into enterprise decision-making.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Enterprise risk data including financial, operational, and third-party risks is highly sensitive. Restrict API access to risk management personnel.

auth.notes: LogicGate API uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant. Client ID and secret from LogicGate API settings. Enterprise access required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise GRC platform pricing based on user count and modules
pricing.notes: Enterprise risk management platform. Pricing negotiated with LogicGate sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Enterprise risk and compliance data is highly sensitive
No public MCP server — OAuth2 client credentials API required
LogicGate's no-code workflow model means data model is customer-configurable — must inspect schema dynamically
API access requires active LogicGate enterprise account
US-only data residency — EU companies must assess compliance posture
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Enterprise risk register and third-party risk data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2 client credentials. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise risk and compliance data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2 client credentials. US data residency.
